user_prompt: A 9:16 portrait 1080x1920 mobile game UI mockup, high-fidelity, for a time-limited shop screen in a nautical treasure-hunting board-game event. Style: stylized 3D cartoon render, warm-toned medieval/fantasy game UI, X3 Design System palette (cream parchment #F6E9C4 + warm wood backdrop #4D2E1A, button family yellow/green/blue/red/gold, prestige tier colors), hand-painted item icons rendered at 256x256 transparent, no flat colors. Overall layout on a deep warm-wood backdrop (#4D2E1A) with a layered aged-parchment scroll panel (#F6E9C4 / #EFDCC1) as the main board, framed by carved wooden ship-wheel and rope corner ornaments. TOP BAR: an ornate carved wooden title banner across the top displaying the title text 'LIMITED-TIME SHOP' in heavy bold sans (PuHuiTi Bold style) with a #F0C74D gold outline and subtle dark drop shadow (NOT a full gold gradient fill); directly below the title a prominent hourglass-style global countdown timer pill showing '23:47:12' in red urgency tint; a circular wooden close X button in the top-right corner. STICKY CURRENCY BAR: a weathered brass-and-wood horizontal bar pinned just under the header showing on the left a faceted blue diamond gem icon with balance '1,280' and a round gold '+' acquire button, and on the right a star-shaped activity-coin icon with balance '540' and another round gold '+' button. PRODUCT GRID: a 2-column vertical grid of 6 product cards on the parchment, sorted by prestige so the purple-epic and gold-legendary cards sit at the top with faint glow, blue-common and green-fine below. Each card is a rounded wooden-framed tile with a quality tier border colored by rarity (blue #4D9EDE common, green #4DB366 fine, purple #A666D9 epic, gold #F0C74D legendary), a large hand-painted item icon centered (treasure chest, gem pile, captain hero token, resource bundle, sail boost), item name and quantity 'x10' below, and a small parchment price tag at the bottom with a currency icon plus number; discounted cards show a struck-through original price with a red ribbon '-30%' corner badge; each card carries a small red 'Left 3/10' scarcity/purchase-limit corner badge and a bright gold rounded purchase button at the bottom. STATE DIVERSITY clearly shown across the six cards: two normal buyable cards with glowing gold buttons, one discounted card with strike-through price and red '-X%' ribbon, one SOLD OUT card with a semi-transparent dark grey overlay and wax-seal 'SOLD OUT' stamp, and one ALREADY PURCHASED card with a grey overlay and a gold checkmark seal stamp. Emotional tone: FOMO-driven fast bargain-hunting, scarcity from countdown and limited stock, warm cozy treasure-vault feeling, crisp readable hierarchy. display_style: heavy bold sans headers, title in #F0C74D gold outline only (no full gold gradient), warm parchment surfaces with soft baked shadows, red ribbon accents for urgency. Avoid: no Pixar style / no painterly thick brush strokes / no realistic photography / no anime CG / no manga lineart / no flat / minimal / Material design feel / no neon / cyberpunk / no purple background unless requested / no media query responsive / no raw hex outside design tokens / no full title gold gradient — X3 is not as gilded as X2.
